statement.en: Combating foreign bribery and corruption : an integrated corporate governance, sustainability, and artificial intelligence approach
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Thesis is embargoed with abstract unavailable; core claims cannot be evaluated. The integration of AI, governance, and anti-corruption is conceptually sound but remains provisional pending full publication and peer review. The 2026 date indicates future work.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 腐敗の逆数は、三つの力の積として現れる—それぞれが欠けると全体が崩れる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 中心の腐敗に向かって、三つの光が同時に収束し、相互に支える構造。
